notes: The reusable quality gate treats missions 002-009 as untrusted unless a fresh audit records verified: true and trust: trusted for a mission.
This file is project-local reconciliation input, not reusable workflow logic.
Verification requires state integrity, Spec Kitty API probes, spec/code fidelity, product-vision review, and the relevant regression tests.

002.blocking_reason: Implementation evidence must be reconciled against code and tests, not trusted from status events alone.

003.blocking_reason: Regression and rollback-classification evidence must be rechecked before mission trust.

004.blocking_reason: Planned-only mission remains blocked until artifact and readiness audit passes.

005.blocking_reason: Checklist behavior requires live API assumptions to be validated before trust.

006.blocking_reason: Partially completed mission needs state, spec/code, and regression reconciliation.

007.blocking_reason: Prior done state is not enough; the quality gate requires fresh reconciliation evidence.

008.blocking_reason: Behavioral-mode changes need product-vision and regression evidence before trust.

009.blocking_reason: Memory and behavioral-signal scope remains blocked until artifact audit passes.
